trait.name: Hatred
trait.effect: Once a round, when you damage a target, you may inflict them with hatred (-). Hatred is a unique negative status. A character suffering from hatred deals 1/2 damage to all characters other than you as long as you are not immune to damage, and in line of sight and range 1-3 from them. A character removes one hatred after using any ability that damages you.

basicAttack.name: Furor
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6.
On hit 2 vigor. If you or your target is in crisis, deals damage [+] and double vigor gain.

limitBreak.name: Mock
limitBreak.effect:
There are innumerable words in innumerable tongues for what I am about to say to you. Fortunately, I have picked the very best.
Effect foe takes 1d3 piercing damage, then gains 3 dazed, 3 stun, and becomes immobile and unable to take interrupts until the start of its next turn.
Effect you defeat a legend or elite foe with this ability, immediately gain 1 personal resolve or grant 1 to an ally.

keywords.name: Afflicted
keywords.description: Gains bonuses if your foe is suffering from a status.
